title: Amcor to report Half Year 2023 results
text: ZURICH , Jan. 24, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Amcor plc (NYSE: AMCR; ASX: AMC) will announce its Half Year 2023 results for the six months ended 31 December 2022 after the US market closes on Tuesday 7 February 2023.   A conference call and webcast to discuss the results will be held at 5.30pm US Eastern Standard Time on Tuesday 7  February 2023 / 9.30am Australian Eastern Daylight Time on Wednesday 8 February 2023.

title: 5 Dividend Aristocrat Buys For January
text: "Dividend Aristocrats. in the S&P 500 Index have raised their annual payouts every year for at least 25 consecutive years. "--Kiplinger.com/Investing. 65 Aristocrats screened as of January 3, 2022 represented all eleven Morningstar Sectors. Broker estimated-top-ten net-gains ranged 13.23%-26.61% topped by VFC & TGT.
